title: Binary Search Tree
code:
type 'a tree =
  | Leaf
  | Node of 'a tree * 'a * 'a tree

let rec insert x = function
  | Leaf -> Node (Leaf, x, Leaf)
  | Node (l, v, r) ->
    if x < v then Node (insert x l, v, r)
    else if x > v then Node (l, v, insert x r)
    else Node (l, v, r)

let rec to_sorted_list = function
  | Leaf -> []
  | Node (l, v, r) -> to_sorted_list l @ [v] @ to_sorted_list r

let () =
  let tree = List.fold_left (fun t x -> insert x t) Leaf [5; 3; 7; 1; 4] in
  List.iter (Printf.printf "%d ") (to_sorted_list tree)
description: A polymorphic binary search tree with `insert` and in-order traversal. The `'a tree` type uses algebraic data types with `Leaf` and `Node` constructors. `List.fold_left` builds the tree from a list of values.
